data.name: Hentai Clicker: Luna is streaming
data.detailed_description:
🎮 Welcome to Hentai Clicker: Luna is streaming

Step into a sparkling world of magic and mischief where Luna, a flirty magical girl, goes live to enchant her audience. Cute, confident, and a little naughty, Luna knows how to turn spells into smiles—and clicks into excitement. With every tap, her magic grows stronger, her confidence shines brighter, and her show becomes more irresistible.

She’s here to protect the world…
and to steal your attention. ✨💖

🍑 About the Game

Hentai Clicker: Luna is streaming blends addictive clicker gameplay with a charming magical-girl fantasy. Click to collect hearts, progress through glowing stages, and help Luna unlock new powers, outfits, and reactions as her stream evolves.

As you advance, you’ll discover magical costumes, animated reactions full of teasing charm, and playful voice lines that reflect Luna’s mischievous personality. Upgrade your skills to gather hearts faster and reveal everything this enchanting heroine has to offer—one spellbinding click at a time.

🎉 Features

✨ Magical Girl Fantasy – Cute, confident, and delightfully cheeky
🎨 Colorful Anime Visuals – Sparkling effects and vibrant magical designs
🖱️ Addictive Clicker Gameplay – Easy to start, satisfying to master
💗 Unlockable Outfits – From classic magical uniforms to bolder looks
🔊 Interactive Voice & Reactions – Luna reacts to your progress live
🚀 Upgrades & Progression – Boost heart gains and unlock new content

💖 Why You’ll Love It

If you enjoy magical aesthetics, playful teasing, and a heroine who knows how to charm her audience, Luna is the perfect choice. Sweet yet daring, she balances cute energy with confident allure—making every click feel rewarding.

Relaxing, colorful, and irresistibly fun, Hentai Clicker: Luna is streaming turns magic into pure entertainment.

🎮 How to Play

🖱️ Click to Collect Hearts – Each tap powers up Luna’s magic
🔓 Unlock Costumes & Content – Spend hearts to reveal new looks
💥 Upgrade Skills – Progress faster and discover everything

🎉 Let the Magic Begin!

Luna is live and ready to shine.
Jump into Hentai Clicker: Luna is streaming and enjoy the spell. ✨📺

data.short_description: ✨💖 Hentai Clicker: Luna is streaming Click to collect hearts, unlock magical girl outfits, and upgrade your skills in this addictive anime clicker. Enjoy playful teasing, colorful visuals, and charming reactions as Luna enchants her live stream!
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 韓文, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 ou équivalent
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD Graphics 4000
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.11
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon and Apple M1
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD Radeon R9 M370X
  • 儲存空間: 400 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Carte intégrée (Intel HD Graphics 3000)
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GTX 560
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
